pullRequest.title: Feature-298: Flag to Disable File Generation
pullRequest.body:
### **PR Type** Enhancement, Tests, Documentation ___ ### **Description** - Add `--suppress-logs` flag to disable file/log/db generation - Propagate suppression logic to all relevant classes (logger, DB, report) - Update logger to respect suppression and log level - Refactor logger initialization for flexibility and testability - Allow passing logger/generate_logs to major components - Improve logger test coverage - Update CLI, usage docs, and examples for new flag - Add flag to argument parsers and usage documentation - Extend tests to verify suppression flag behavior ___ ### **Changes walkthrough** 📝
Relevant files
Enhancement
9 files

Add suppression logic for logs, DB, and reports; propagate flag
 +32/-12

Refactor logger to support suppression and log level         
+28/-22

Support logger and suppression flag in test generator       
+9/-1

Support logger and suppression flag in test validator       
+10/-3

Support logger and suppression flag in agent completion   
+5/-3

 +6/-2
